title: DIVE-PL: A reproducible AI tool-chain methodology for building survey research studies
description: An end-to-end, reproducible framework integrating an LLM design/orchestration agent, an independent LLM reviewer (LLM-as-judge), REDCap electronic data capture, and AI-built analytics dashboards, wrapped in an open-science layer. Case study: recreational divers in Poland.

creators.name: Minarowski, Łukasz
creators.affiliation: Medical University of Białystok, Department of Respiratory Physiopathology
